artifacts.summary: Multi-family BFMCS infrastructure with Phase 1 complete, Phase 2 blocked

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 (domain definition) complete. Phase 2 (modal coherence) blocked on modal_backward proof. Analysis shows phi-in-MCS does not imply Box-phi-in-MCS from syntactic MCS properties alone. Requires alternative approach.

metadata.blocking_issue: modal_backward requires semantic reasoning not available in syntactic MCS theory. The proof that phi-in-t.world implies Box-phi-in-t.world cannot be derived from MCS maximality alone. Options: (1) True multi-family bundle with distinct witnesses per family, (2) Alternative completeness approach bypassing BFMCS modal coherence.

review_reason: Phase 2 blocked - modal_backward proof requires architectural decision on approach
